raw_consumer_statement: Sometime between XXXX XXXX, a credit card was ordered from someone stealing my idenity, ordered an Amex card and sent it to my old address in XXXX XXXX XXXX I filed a police report with the XXXX XXXX Police Department and they found it was fraud. I filed a report with the FTC and they found it was XXXX. I filed a report with the XXXX and they found it was fraud. I sent all of this information to all 3 credit bureaus and they found it to be fraud and removed it from my credit report. Now, every year, American Express keeps adding it back on to my credit bureaus and I have to go through the same dispute process. This account is not mine and has been proven by XXXX and local law enforcement to be fraud. Please help me to remove this from my credit reports permanently.
